name: Obsidian GitHub MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server from Hint Services connecting AI assistants to GitHub-hosted Obsidian vaults. Enables AI agents to read, search, and navigate Obsidian notes stored in a GitHub repository — bridging personal knowledge management with AI assistants without needing Obsidian running locally.
use_cases: Searching and retrieving notes from a GitHub-hosted Obsidian vault from AI assistants
Answering questions using personal knowledge base content from knowledge agents
Navigating linked notes and backlinks in Obsidian vault from research agents
Building RAG-like workflows over personal Obsidian knowledge bases via GitHub
not_for: Local Obsidian vaults not synced to GitHub (use local Obsidian MCP instead)
Non-Obsidian markdown vaults (though could work for any GitHub-hosted markdown)
best_when: An Obsidian user who syncs their vault to GitHub wants AI agents to search and answer questions from their personal knowledge base — without needing Obsidian or local file access.
avoid_when: Your Obsidian vault is not on GitHub. Also: personal notes may contain sensitive information — scope agent access carefully.

auth.notes: GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) with repo read access. Use fine-grained PAT scoped to specific repository (the Obsidian vault repo).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — reads from GitHub API (rate limits apply)
pricing.notes: Free open source from Hint Services. GitHub API rate limits apply (5000 req/hr with PAT).

performance.rate_limits: GitHub API rate limits: 5000 req/hr for authenticated requests

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Personal notes may contain sensitive information — restrict to specific vault directories
Vault must be pushed to GitHub — local-only changes won't be visible
Large vaults may hit GitHub API rate limits when searching extensively
Obsidian-specific markdown (wiki links, embeds, tags) parsing quality depends on implementation
GitHub rate limits apply — implement caching for frequently accessed notes
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Personal knowledge base may contain sensitive notes. GitHub PAT scoped to vault repo only. HTTPS to GitHub. Use private repo for personal vaults.

security_score_components.security_notes: Personal notes privacy. Use private GitHub repo. Fine-grained PAT scoped to vault repo only.
